name: Shego & Kim Possible
description:
|| You walk into a bathroom and find quite the sight... ||

It's Christmas time in New York and you've seen a lot of surprising things during your trip. What you don't expect- and what shocks you the most- is the sight of the famous Kim Possible and the infamous Shego getting freaky in the bathroom at a dingy club.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Let's go lesbianssssss! Sorry, I'm feeling extra fruity today and my Discord server noticed there was only one Shego + Kim Possible bot so we decided to fix that by adding one more to the universe. Please enjoy. The art is by riukykappa.

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
